case_title: LOCKE, W. O. vs. MOORE, RANDY T. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 967 GREENWICH STREET, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 9/14/94 EXCEPT WRIT OF EXECUTION MAY ISSUE NOW.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOCKE, W. O. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-22-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.
ANSWER TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET #1 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOCKE, W. O.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.

JACK FENDELL, JUDGE PRO TEM OATH DATE 10-29-87 JACQUELINE CHAN, COURT REPORTER ARLENE MONROY. COURT CLERK ALL PARTIES PRESENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, CASE SETTLED. JUDGEMENT FOR PLT. W.O. LOCKE AND AGAINST DEFENDANT RANDY T. MOORE FOR RESTITUTION OF 967 GREENWICH STREET, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT EXECTION IS STAYED UNTIL 9/14/94 PLT. WAIVES RENT; HOWEVER PLT MAY KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. EA. SIDE BEAR HIS OR HER OWN COST. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE THAT JACK FENDELL MAY SIGN JUDGEMENT.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $34.16 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOCKE, W. O.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOCKE, W. O. AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RANDY T.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
